xmldoc.short_description: Return a variable class name or create an old-style named object.

param_input_item.param_description: a class name as a string

param_output_item.param_description: an old-style object of type className based on structure st

description.p: class(var) returns the class name of var.
For classdef value and handle objects, class returns the classdef class name, including package qualification when applicable.
class(st, className) preserves Nelson old-style object creation and is independent from classdef class definitions.

example_item.example_item_description: Return classdef value and handle class names.

history_item.history_description: classdef value and handle object behavior documented
